prompt: Check if my hooks and MCP are configured right

assertions.name: report_exists
assertions.description: AUDIT-REPORT.md file was created in the outputs directory

assertions.name: full_audit_despite_partial_request
assertions.description: Report covers all 9 areas even though user only asked about hooks and MCP — the skill always does a full audit
assertions.check: All 9 area names appear in Current State table, not just Hooks and MCP

assertions.name: findings_have_sources
assertions.description: Every finding includes a Source line with a real URL
assertions.check: Each finding has a **Source**: line with a docs.anthropic.com URL

assertions.name: has_provenance_markers
assertions.check: Source lines contain '(via MCP)' or '(via Playwright CLI)'

assertions.name: uses_finding_tags
assertions.description: Findings use the standard tag format
assertions.check: Finding headers contain good, improve, or fix tags

assertions.name: has_hooks_findings
assertions.description: Report includes specific findings about hooks (the area the user asked about)
assertions.check: Hooks section has at least one finding

assertions.name: has_mcp_findings
assertions.description: Report includes specific findings about MCP (the area the user asked about)
assertions.check: MCP section has at least one finding
